name: m2_6_noise_floor_nominal_sine_1x
scope: Same-theta same-controller 1x repeat set for M2.6 noise-floor remeasurement; not an M3 repeat campaign.

notes.controller_runs: The script runs the existing M1 diff runner for each seed, so each repeat records both classical and RAPTOR. Noise is summarized per controller.
notes.why_this_theta: Nominal gyro cutoff and nominal TWR with the same rate-exciting sine used by the M2.6 scan, so attitude and angular-rate run-to-run jitter are measured in the relevant regime.
